message:
feat(telemetry): Add rch-telemetry crate with memory metrics collection

Implements memory metrics collection for worker telemetry (beads-43v):
- Parse /proc/meminfo for Linux memory stats
- Calculate memory pressure score (accounts for swap and dirty pages)
- Support PSI (Pressure Stall Information) on Linux 4.20+
- Handle old kernel fallbacks (MemAvailable estimation)
- 13 comprehensive unit tests with structured logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+[package]
+name = "rch-telemetry"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+description = "Telemetry collection for Remote Compilation Helper workers"
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+thiserror = { workspace = true }
+tracing = { workspace = true }
+chrono = { workspace = true }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+tempfile = "3.19"
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true }
+
+[lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+//! System metrics collection modules.
+//!
+//! This module provides collectors for various system metrics from /proc
+//! filesystem (Linux) for worker telemetry.
+
+pub mod memory;

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+//! Telemetry collection for Remote Compilation Helper workers.
+//!
+//! This crate provides utilities for collecting system metrics from worker
+//! machines, including CPU, memory, disk I/O, and network statistics.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod collect;
+
+pub use collect::memory::{MemoryInfo, MemoryPressureStall, MemoryTelemetry};
